doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_flags_test (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L117-L123). Three-line C body: `return __gmpfr_flags & mask` -- AND of the global flag register with mask, returned as an int.

The TS port takes (pre, mask) and returns `(pre & mask) & MPFR_FLAGS_ALL` as a bigint. Wire form encodes pre because the function depends on the prior global state.

Class 'misc' (1000ms per-case budget). Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c:
Two divergences:

  1. Return type: C returns mpfr_flags_t (unsigned int); TS returns bigint to match the rest of the flag family which returns bigint flag states.

  2. Parameter list: C takes (mask); TS takes (pre, mask) -- pre is the prior global state.

  Mechanism: `(pre & mask) & 63n`. Mirrors getFlags() & mask after setFlags(pre).
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L117-L123 -- the C reference body.
src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts -- getFlags() is the canonical read path.
